title: チューリップ賞にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Here starts the Tulip Sho—springtime preliminary
to an upcoming G1 Classic!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heh. This kinda feels like a starting grid.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's where motorcycles start their races. It feels as
if I'm finally standin' in one...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
At the Hanshin J.F. last year, I was so scared that
I didn't even know what was what. But now...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But now I know exactly what I need to do. This is where everything really begins!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. You're the reason I can be so calm. You've
stayed by my side this whole time no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: And... maybe also because she's around.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You know, that constant pain in my butt, Daiwa
Scarlet. You know what she said in our room
yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm tomorrow's main star! I'm the tulip's flower,
and you're the stem. Just the stem!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What did you just call me?! You're just the soil under the real Tulip winner's feet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. If you don't want to be treated like a stem,
prove that you have more than just natural talent.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Do me a favor and don't talk down to me when
you haven't achieved anything better than I have,
all right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Aughhh! Just thinkin' back on it pisses me off! I'm
gonna make her eat dirt until she cries!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
When I think like that, I'm not even nervous. This
is no time for me to be shakin' in my boots.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Daiwa Scarlet helps ease Vodka's
tension just by existing.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Time to give that cheeky brat a little
beatdown.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I just gotta get serious. I'm not about to lose to
some Goody Two-shoes!
